name: Reply Queue Bar
short_description: Capture copied comments or inbox snippets, triage responses, and hand off the next draft.
audience: Founders replying across social and product channels
Operators who turn copied feedback into fast responses
detail_lines: Captures copied comments, DMs, or feedback snippets into a local reply queue with source labels, buckets, urgency, and optional draft text.
Ranks urgent and reusable reply work ahead of archive material so the next response is obvious without reopening every tab.
Ships with a deterministic helper script and a menu-bar prototype so the reply handoff works before a full app target exists.
